name: Citrus Mint Punch
recipeIngredient: 1 can Thawed frozen lemonade concentrate (12 ounces)
1 can Thawed frozen Orange Juice Concentrate (12 ounces)
recipeInstructions:
Source: A Taste of Home Magazine, Jun/Jul 1996
1. Place mint and peels in a heat-resistant pitcher or bowl; add boiling water. Let steep for 1 hour.
2. Strain the mixture into a large container.
3. Add the frozen lemonade concentrate and frozen orange juice concentrate to the strained liquid.
4. Stir well until all ingredients are fully combined.
5. Pour in the cold water and stir again.
6. Chill the punch in the refrigerator.
7. Serve over ice, garnishing with additional mint leaves if desired.
Yield: 18-20 servings (3 quarts)
